prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-POCKKNFBLK-PBK241BK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Drop Point Blade Thumb Assist Pocket Knife Stainless Steel – Black Description: The ASR Tactical Drop Point Blade Pocket Knife is the perfect tool for everyday carry. Constructed of durable stainless steel that won't rust, you can count on it rain or shine, making it a great option for hunters and campers.

The drop point blade features a convex spine that is designed to be easily controlled, so you'll get the perfect cut every time. It boasts a cool black ergonomic handle that will keep your hand steady and safe during use.

Our pocket knife also comes with a convenient steel pocket clip so you can easily secure it inside of your pocket when not in use to protect yourself and the blade. It features an easy-to-use thumb assist open for quick deployment. Its compact design makes this a great EDC tool without adding bulk. Search Terms: pocket knives blades EDC knife every day carry tools camping hunting drop point thumb assist survival kit bug out bag emergency Features: - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made stainless steel, the ASR Tactical pocket knife won't rust so you can count on it rain or shine. It features a sleek black ergonomic handle for safe and easy handling. - DROP POINT BLADE - The convex spine of drop point blades are designed to be easily controlled, making this a great blade for hunters and campers. - STEEL POCKET CLIP - The knife comes with a convenient black steel pocket clip so you can secure it inside of your pocket to keep it safe when not in use. - THUMB ASSIST OPEN - Our pocket knife features an easy-to-use thumb assist open for quick deployment. The compact design makes this a great EDC tool without adding bulk. - SPECIFICATIONS - Overall length: 8"; Blade length: 3.25"; Handle length: 4.75"; Material: Stainless steel; Weight: 5.7 ounces/.36 pounds === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
